title: Marketplace Manager - ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Thane-based team.

About ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd:
ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd!
